message:
feat(dashboard): add TerminalSession struct for SSH proxy

Add the TerminalSession struct that will manage SSH connections to VMs
for the web terminal feature. Also adds golang.org/x/crypto/ssh dependency.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+package dashboard
+
+import (
+	"io"
+	"sync"
+
+	"golang.org/x/crypto/ssh"
+)
+
+// TerminalSession represents an active terminal connection to a VM.
+type TerminalSession struct {
+	ID       string
+	TaskID   string
+	Hostname string
+	User     string
+
+	client  *ssh.Client
+	session *ssh.Session
+	stdin   io.WriteCloser
+	stdout  io.Reader
+	stderr  io.Reader
+
+	mu     sync.Mutex
+	closed bool
+}
